items.name_en: [Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
items.name_cn:
[Heart][Rose] Original 2024 Early Spring Style [Heart][Rose]! Dior Book Tote
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this tote bag is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. Designed for daily essentials, this large tote features all-over embroidery paired with the iconic blue Dior Oblique pattern and a "Christian Dior" logo on the front. Fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, it can be paired with other small accessories or Mitzah scarves for a cohesive look!
Adjustable, removable embroidered shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
2 internal patch pockets
Includes dust bag
Number: M1325CZBB_M928
Dimensions: 26.5×21×14cm

items.name_en: [Highest Version, Factory Leather, Top-tier Original, Full Counter Packaging] Medium Dior Toujours Vertical Bag
items.name_cn:
[Highest Version, Factory Leather, Top-tier Original, Full Counter Packaging] Medium Dior Toujours Vertical Bag
8806
Black Calfskin Oversized Wicker Weave
Number: M2836OSNW_
This Dior Toujours vertical bag is stylish, practical, and unique. Crafted from black calfskin and adorned with oversized wicker weave stitching, it features a spacious interior compartment for various daily essentials. It features a fine leather drawstring closure for secure storage, along with a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the style. The medium size comes with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Main Material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Double Opening: Fine drawstring and Christian Dior Paris drawstring with CD Lock clasp
D.I.O.R. Charm
Internal card slot
Top leather handle
Detachable leather shoulder strap
Includes dust bag
Size: 20 x 22 x 18.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 2 wallets, 1 phone, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
[With full original packaging]
Medium size White in stock!!️
Take Toujours for a trip, oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is soft, calfskin material feels premium, unique clasp design allows the sides to fold when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items.
size:28.5*19*21cm

items.name_cn:
[With full original packaging]
Medium size in stock!!️
Toujours series new Sweet Pink from the brick cabinet, a bit too beautiful. High-visual-appeal pink bag, the color is super tender and very summery. It is a low-saturation pink-purple, easily mastering the macaron color. Oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is soft, calfskin material feels premium, unique clasp design allows the sides to fold when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items.
size:28.5*19*21cm

items.name_cn:
『Dior』
🆕 Small 【Di.or Book Tote】M1286 Blue D 💙 Small
Size: 26.5 x 21 x 14 cm
The latest small size of the Tote, I was drawn to this bag 🌿, it is slightly shorter than the original small size, looking very delicate 😘, retaining the exquisite cuteness of a small bag while also having the large capacity of a big bag, fully meeting daily travel needs 🙋🏻‍♀️, classic jacquard embroidery, iconic letters, stylish and versatile with a full retro atmosphere 🤗
